subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Countenance when it appeared from this Horizon, whereby the Books of God have been adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الوجه اذ ظهر من هذا الافق الذی تزین بذکره کتب الله
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment, @love of God
